label: Per-Venue Balances
description: Free, locked, total, margin, and utilisation balances broken down per connected venue.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required in widget file. 0.1 confirmed via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2/0.3 set in register.ts. 0.4 no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 no lib/mocks imports. 0.6 isLoading forwarded to TableWidget. 0.7 emptyMessage prop set. 0.8 error+onRetry forwarded. 0.9 no dead code.

1.4.note: no client — level cascade in context; human to decide if accounts domain needs clientIds filtering

1.5.note: accounts balance table has no strategy dimension

1.7.note: ACCOUNTS fixture used for org — venue mapping in context; should move to lib/constants/accounts.ts. MOCK_SAFTS is demo data surfaced via saftRecords; acceptable for now but flagged.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — widget reads only from useAccountsData(). 1.2 pass — context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 pass — org filter wired via orgVenues/globalScope.organizationIds. 1.4 finding — no clientIds cascade in accounts-data-context.tsx (no client-level filtering). 1.5 finding — no strategyIds cascade (accounts domain has no strategy relevance, likely N/A). 1.6 pass — empty organizationIds yields orgVenues=null which returns full unfiltered dataset. 1.7 finding — ACCOUNTS and MOCK_SAFTS imported from lib/mocks/fixtures in context; ACCOUNTS is reference/org-venue mapping data that should live in lib/constants/; MOCK_SAFTS is demo data that should move to lib/mocks/demo/ or lib/constants/. Widget file itself has no mock imports.

knownIssues.detail: globalScope.clientIds is not read or applied as a filter. Balances are filtered by org venue membership only. Human to decide if client-level filtering is in scope for the accounts domain.

knownIssues.summary: ACCOUNTS fixture used as org-venue reference data in context
knownIssues.detail: accounts-data-context.tsx imports ACCOUNTS from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data to derive orgVenues. This is static reference/config data and should live in lib/constants/accounts.ts. Not blocking — widget itself is clean.

knownIssues.summary: MOCK_SAFTS demo data surfaced via saftRecords in context
knownIssues.detail: accounts-data-context.tsx imports MOCK_SAFTS from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-pages and exposes it as saftRecords. This is demo/seed data; acceptable while a real SAFT API does not exist, but flagged for future cleanup.

findings: L0: clean — no fixes needed in widget file
L1: widget data flow clean; two context-level findings (ABT-1, ABT-2, ABT-3) documented above, none blocking
